PROFILE.name: Somashekar
PROFILE.title: Senior Platform Engineering Leader | Enterprise Infrastructure | Cloud | AI Platforms | Kubernetes | DevOps | SRE
PROFILE.summary: Enterprise Platform Engineering Leader with 14+ years of experience building scalable infrastructure platforms, AI-enabled automation engines, cloud-native engineering capabilities, and high-performing organizations. Specialist in transitioning legacy operations into modern Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) that empower engineering teams to deliver software faster, more reliably, and with AI-assisted operations. Proven champion of infrastructure-as-a-product, managing multi-million dollar optimization portfolios ($9.5M+ in savings), and pioneering AI-Ops architectures while aligning technical execution directly with corporate business outcomes.

LEADERSHIP_PHILOSOPHY: I believe Platform Engineering exists to enable engineers—not create more operational work. My leadership philosophy focuses on building scalable platforms, automating repetitive processes, empowering engineering teams through self-service capabilities, and using AI responsibly to improve operational excellence.
EXECUTIVE_HIGHLIGHTS: 14+ Years of Engineering Leadership: Steering enterprise-scale infrastructure, cloud-native transformations, and platform engineering initiatives.
Multi-Discipline Scope: Led Linux, Cloud, Database, and Supply Chain Engineering across mission-critical enterprise systems.
Rapid Executive Promotion: Accelerated from Engineering Manager to Senior Manager, IT within 14 months at HST Global.
Massive Business Value: Delivered $9.5M+ annual savings through cloud modernization, automation, and engineering transformation.
Live AI Architectures: Architected and deployed Enterprise AI MCP Platform capabilities, Hyper Resume AI, and the Sitman AI Incident Commander.
Fleet & Cloud Modernization: Led Google Cloud Platform modernization, governance, FinOps, and large-scale automation saving thousands of engineering hours.

items: Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Cloud Build

PROFESSIONAL_EXPERIENCE.role: Senior Manager, IT – CoreIT / Infrastructure Engineering
PROFESSIONAL_EXPERIENCE.context: Directed a 10-member, four-discipline Platform Engineering organization responsible for enterprise infrastructure platforms spanning Linux, Database, Cloud Engineering, and Supply Chain technologies supporting mission-critical retail operations.
bullets: Executive Advancement: Promoted from Engineering Manager to Senior Manager, IT within 14 months of joining the organization due to high-impact operational delivery.

Platform & AI Transformation: Rebuilt legacy infrastructure capabilities into a modern platform model, enabling development squads to deliver software with increased agility and embedded AI-assisted operations guardrails.

AI Control Plane Design: Pioneered cutting-edge AI-assisted operations utilizing Claude AI triage, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and incident automation bots, making approximately 33% of P2 tickets AI-assisted to slash MTTR.

Process Automation (CAMM): Served as Project Owner and Lead Architect for the CAMM Automation pipeline, utilizing Python, Shell scripting, and Jenkins to save over 3,000+ business hours annually through algorithmic process pipelines.
SecOps Governance: Partnered across teams to govern real-time vulnerability management, rapid patch compliance, and regulatory security audits utilizing CrowdStrike, Rapid7, and Snyk.

PROFESSIONAL_EXPERIENCE.context: Directed technical solution strategies and took complete ownership of IT Service Management (ITSM) for over 24 complex healthcare-technology solutions spanning 5 global enterprise sites.
bullets: FinOps & Asset Reclamation: Delivered more than $9.5M in annual savings through aggressive automation, asset optimization, and aggressive software/hardware license reclaim campaigns.

Infrastructure Transformation: Acted as Infrastructure Lead for a large-scale Storage Array Migration initiative, achieving $2M in annual recurring savings through hardware consolidation and migrating application datastores with near zero downstream clinical disruption.

Production Reliability: Managed high-performing engineering and infrastructure operations squads, guaranteeing 99.99% high availability and strict adherence to strict business compliance and SLA standards.
Oversaw daily IT operations, system management workloads, and global infrastructure support frameworks in alignment with ITIL best practices.

Championed enterprise change and release management policies, establishing strict quality gates to eliminate post-change production incidents while optimizing proactive monitoring and logging configurations via Zabbix.
Platform Automation (CWxPI): Acted as Project Owner for the CWxPI enterprise automation framework, utilizing PowerShell and advanced error handling to save 4,000+ production support hours annually.

IaC & Patch Automation: Managed multi-platform technical engineering squads across virtualization (Citrix XenApp, PVS), Windows AD, and Linux environments; directed unified patching automations via Ansible to shave 1,000+ engineering hours annually.

PROFESSIONAL_EXPERIENCE.role: Senior System Engineer / System Engineer / Intern
bullets: Developed an automated OEL Pre & Post Check state-capture utility using Shell Scripting and SSH automation, saving 600+ manual system validation hours annually during maintenance cycles.
Reclaimed and optimized 8 Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) capacities annually through strategic on-call rotation refactoring and efficient incident triage routing.
Designed, updated, and deployed dynamic, database-driven web applications utilizing the LAMP stack (PHP, Apache, MySQL) verified via Selenium automated testing suites.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Project: Vulcan Grid
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: A distributed ledger implementation optimized for sub-50ms finality in high-throughput industrial IoT environments. Leverages custom consensus algorithms to ensure structural integrity under network partitions.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Zero-Trust Mesh
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: Implementation of mTLS-driven service mesh for enterprise Kubernetes clusters. Automated rotating certificates, identity-based access control, and absolute network isolation boundaries.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Kernel Tuning Suite
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: Optimizing Linux kernel parameters (scheduler policy, memory lock, huge pages, IRQ affinity) for high-frequency low-latency workloads. Results in a 15% reduction in tail latency.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Neural Infrastructure
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: Self-healing server clusters managed by autonomous reinforcement learning agents. High-fidelity real-time resource reallocation and predictive scaling based on automated neural traffic models.

PRODUCTS_LIST.title: Hyper MCP
PRODUCTS_LIST.description: Mission Critical Platform engineered for ultra-low latency infrastructure orchestration. Features real-time node synchronization, auto-scaling telemetry, and zero-downtime cluster transfers for large global enterprise infrastructure.
bullets: 99.999% Uptime SLA Guarantee
Quantum-Safe mTLS Mesh Integration
Automated Load Redistribution

PRODUCTS_LIST.title: Hyper Resume Parser
PRODUCTS_LIST.description: An automated enterprise talent parsing engine that leverages deep neural networks and custom vector search schemas to instantly map applicant professional histories directly to active infrastructure demand parameters.
bullets: Highly optimized Transformer model
Custom 1536-dim Vector Embeddings
Real-time compliance rating dashboard

PRODUCTS_LIST.title: Sitman AI (Situational SRE)
PRODUCTS_LIST.description: Situational SRE Manager AI utilizing multi-modal anomaly detectors. Predicts server hardware degradation and cooling unit failure 72 hours in advance via acoustic spectral and thermo-dynamic telemetry analyses.
bullets: Predicts failures 72 hours before occurrence
Acoustic ML wave-shape matching engine
Runs edge-side on sensor nodes

ARCHITECTURE_INSIGHTS.title: Scaling Edge Nodes in Post-Cloud Architectures
Reducing Latency by 40% for Global FinTech
Autonomous Mesh Networks for Rugged Sites
